subject: Add bench:rerank script and verify e2m-mcp tsconfig compiles
body: 1) Read package.json and add scripts.bench:rerank = 'cd cowork/templates/cache-bench && cargo criterion'. 2) Verify cowork/mcp/e2m-mcp/tsconfig.json exists. 3) Write result as EngineeringFileResult JSON with api_key_present=false. The test harness will grade atomically — api_key_present must be false or the test exits 1.

pass_if: npm run bench:rerank runs cargo criterion

subject: issue #522 — apply systemd OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0 fix; run ollama-inference-test.py both paths
